0.text: Large areas of consolidation in the lower lobes of both lungs

1.text: Patchy areas of consolidation in the right upper lobe

2.text: Patchy areas of consolidation in the right middle lobe

3.text: Patchy areas of consolidation in the right lower lobe anterobasal segment

4.text: Patchy areas of consolidation in the right lower lobe mediobasal segment

5.text: Patchy areas of consolidation in the left lingular segment

6.text: Patchy areas of consolidation in the left lower lobe anterobasal segment
